The Attacker's Advantage

Security workshop for IT teams and developers

A 90-minute hands-on workshop covering red team thinking, passive recon, OWASP top vulnerabilities, and live code review exercises.

Topics covered:

  • How attackers think — the kill chain from a red team perspective
  • Passive recon: every company has an exposed surface
  • Most exploited vectors in 2025
  • Live OSINT exercise
  • Find the vulnerability — code review in groups
  • Physical security in shared workspaces

Available for companies and teams. Get in touch.
